extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won stage 4 intermediate sprint and stage finish after late crashes split the peloton, executing textbook leadout while rivals scrambled.
tactical_patterns: Soudal-Quick-Step radio explicitly ordered closing dangerous moves at intermediate sprint, anticipating breakaway attempts at mid-race sprint points.
Peloton crash immediately after intermediate sprint created split requiring desperate chase, eliminating organized leadouts for actual finish sprint.
Alpecin executed intact leadout despite chaos while Jumbo-Visma and others lost sprinter positioning in split peloton.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: Won both intermediate sprint and stage finish despite peloton chaos, suggesting superior positioning instincts or team protection through crashes
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: Six inches from victory after three winless years, finished second after also nearly winning stage 3, form clearly returning
rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: neutral: Third on both stage 3 and stage 4, consistent top-3 finisher but unable to convert positioning to wins
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Visible struggle to find wheels in chaotic sprint, needed to 'break soon' but couldn't get clear position
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: Mentioned trying to get through but blocked, suggesting leadout issues or poor pre-sprint positioning
